headline: Chipotle (CMG) Stock May Be Fully Priced With Fair Earnings
summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill has seen its share price fall 38.0% over the past year, yet on current checks the stock still does not screen as a clear bargain. The Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate points to a premium price tag, while market based multiples look closer to fair. A 38.0% share price decline over the last 12 months puts Chipotle Mexican Grill firmly in the “out of favor” camp. This often prompts investors to reassess whether sentiment has moved further than...
